data.narrative: Student successfully completed Module 8. They traced the CI integration missing record failure back to execution context differences between tests running locally on a persistent DB versus CI running on a clean DB. By standardizing on TestClient, they successfully built a robust test suite.

dimension_scores.observation: Student structured robust tests and clear documentation prompts.
dimension_scores.evidence: Converted legacy verification scripts to TestClient and generated ADR/Setup/API documentation artifacts.

dimension_scores.observation: Analyzed the testing context deeply and diagnosed the CI isolation issue correctly.
dimension_scores.evidence: Diagnosed that CI executes on a clean machine exposing hidden dependencies, while local uses persistent data.

dimension_scores.observation: Identified the root cause immediately and applied a clean, standardized fix.
dimension_scores.evidence: One-shot conversion of multiple files to TestClient syntax.

dimension_scores.observation: Accurately diagnosed that legacy requests-based tests were failing in clean CI environments due to dependency on live state.
dimension_scores.evidence: Identified that requests required localhost:8000 which isn't running in CI.

dimension_scores.observation: Successfully standardized tests to TestClient and generated high-quality final documentation artifacts.
dimension_scores.evidence: All 22 integration and verification tests pass asynchronously.

strengths: Excellent diagnostic skills identifying database isolation and persistent state issues.
Robust fix applied by migrating legacy scripts to TestClient.
Strong capability to generate complete API and architectural documentation.
data.recommendation: Keep standardizing tests around clean database context and TestClient for deterministic CI execution.

public_evidence.student_action: Migrated legacy requests scripts to TestClient and fixed CI execution consistency.
public_evidence.technical_detail: Converted test_teams_verification.py, test_role_management_auth.py, and test_module_04.py to use fastapi.testclient.TestClient to avoid requiring a running localhost server. Updated .github/workflows/ci.yml to run all tests.
public_evidence.proof: pytest -v executed 22 passing tests in the clean testing environment.
public_evidence.ability: Diagnoses and remediates test infrastructure inconsistencies.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Shows the student understands how to make tests robust and deterministic in CI environments.

concepts_demonstrated.evidence: Updated .github/workflows/ci.yml to execute migrations and all isolated tests.
Replaced external requests with TestClient to isolate integration boundaries.

teaching_approaches.detail: Guided student to identify isolation failures in tests.

learning_style_signals: Methodical planner with strong focus on CI-level verification and test isolation.
